visual_language: vintage textile, stitched seam lines, embroidered floral motifs, fabric weave texture, pastel patchwork blocks
encounter: The viewer arrives at a softly lit quilt spread across the page — each collection is a distinct fabric patch bordered by hand-stitched seams. Works appear as embroidered tiles within each patch block.
intent: Evoke the warmth and handcraft of a cherished heirloom quilt; every artwork is a thread in the larger textile.

components.description: Full-page fabric weave texture with stitched grid overlay
A fabric patch bordered by dashed embroidery-stitch seam lines, with a corner floral motif
A small quilted tile with fabric mat and stitched border containing the artwork image
Dashed stitching lines dividing collection patches in the vertical quilt
Collection title styled as an embroidered fabric label with floral decorations

layout_engine.scroll: vertical page scroll; each collection is a responsive quilt grid
